title: Jab Pyar Kisise Hota Hai
actors: Dev Anand, Asha Parekh, Sulochana Latkar
plot: Nisha lives a very wealthy lifestyle in Neelgaon, India, with her businessman dad, Sardar Roop Singh. She is now of marriageable age, and her dad wants her to marry his friend's son, Sohan, but Nisha dislikes him. While traveling ...
